titlestmt.titleproper: Ithaca Area United Jewish Community records6876

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Ithaca Area United Jewish Community records
did.abstract: The collection includes correspondence, meeting minutes, annual reports, newsletters and other printed matter, publications, photographs, and architectural plans reflecting the activities of the organization..

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: The collection includes correspondence, meeting minutes, annual reports, newsletters and other printed matter, publications, photographs, and architectural plans reflecting the activities of the organization. Includes official Board business; Treasurers' Reports, Board meeting minutes, fund raising campaigns, public relations and advertising, financial allocations, the United Jewish Appeal, the Ithaca Jewish Welfare Fund and the Committee for the Resettlement of Jewish Refuges in Ithaca.

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Access restricted to the permission of the Chair or other officers of the Board.

userestrict.head: Restrictions on Use:
userestrict.p: Information that personally identifies an individual by name and/or address cannot be published in either print or electronic form.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Ithaca Area United Jewish Community records, #6876. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

did.unittitle: Rabbi Felix Aber Religious School of Temple Beth-El
First United Jewish Appeal Young Leadership Conference
The United Synagogue of America Biennial Convention
UJA Public Relations and Advertising Program
